sys_ui_page.description:
x_153465_discovert_cancel_prompt
2.5.3 - 325 - corrected spelling error on the cancellation reason field when writing to Task field from page
sys_ui_page.html:
var gr = new GlideAggregate("x_153465_discovert_route_task_instance"); gr.addQuery("parent", '${jvar_taskSysId}'); gr.addAggregate('COUNT'); gr.query();
This Task has ${gr.getAggregate('COUNT')} Subtask(s) that are also going to be canceled. Do you want to continue?




Are you sure you want to cancel this task?
${gs.getMessage('Cancel')}
sys_ui_page.name: cancel_prompt
